snapshot.description: Implement length-sorted content batching in onnx_runtime.go. Add adaptive batch sizes (64 for short content, 32 for long). Implement parser instance pools by extension in ast_indexer_parse.go to eliminate alloc/dealloc overhead per file.
snapshot.title: Implement batch embedding + parser pooling (v0.20.5)
